overall.description: A first-person walk along a desert dirt road in GTA V, featuring encounters with a motorcycle rider and delivery truck while approaching a coastal overlook. The scene depicts the Grand Senora Desert with clear midday lighting, sparse vegetation, and rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert roadside with rocky hillside and wooden structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road shoulder, passing a parked brown car and approaching a rocky hillside with a large wooden structure

unpaved desert road with tire tracks and patches of grass
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines running parallel to the road

rocky outcrops and boulders on the hillside with sparse desert vegetation
yellow diamond-shaped road sign indicating a curve ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desert dirt road with a brown car parked on the right shoulder. The terrain features rocky hillsides with sparse vegetation and a large wooden structure perched on the hill. Power lines run parallel to the road under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road curve with oncoming traffic

events.description: camera turns around to face oncoming traffic approaching from behind
motorcycle rider wearing red helmet passes closely by the camera

agents.ego_description: turning around to face the road as a motorcycle and car approach, stepping aside to let the motorcycle pass by

motorcycle with rider approaching on the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face oncoming traffic as a blue car and motorcycle approach. The motorcycle rider wearing a red helmet passes closely by while the blue car remains parked on the left side of the road. The wooden structure on the hill is now behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal desert road approaching ocean overlook

ocean becomes visible in the distance as the road approaches the coastal overlook

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt road toward the coast, passing a parked delivery truck and approaching the ocean overlook

blue ocean visible in the distance beyond the road curve

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the coast along the desert road, passing a parked eCola delivery truck on the right. The ocean becomes visible in the distance beyond the curve, with power lines continuing alongside the road and rocky terrain on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert dirt road that gradually transitions from a rocky inland hillside toward a distant coastal vista. It begins by moving past a brown car parked on the shoulder, with power lines stretching forward under a clear blue sky and a large wooden structure perched on the adjacent rocky hills. As the camera turns to face oncoming traffic, a motorcycle rider in a red helmet passes closely by while a blue car remains stationary on the left. The scene then shifts back toward the horizon, passing a parked eCola delivery truck on the right as the terrain continues to curve. Finally, the road opens up to reveal the ocean appearing in the distance beyond the rocky landscape.
